hero.title: Miami real estate, considered.
hero.intro: Premium homes in Miami and South Florida. We work with a small number of clients each year, by referral.

aboutSection.title: Founder-led. By referral.
aboutSection.founderAlt: Adiel Figueroa, founder of Estate One Group
aboutSection.body1: Estate One Group is led by Adiel Figueroa from Miami. He works directly with a small number of clients each year — most introductions come by referral.
aboutSection.body2: The focus is architectural literacy and off-market access: who built the home, how it was built, and what hasn't yet reached public listings. The conversation happens in English or Spanish, with equal precision.

footer.title: Find a home worth keeping.
footer.intro: Off-market access and architectural focus, by referral. We work with a small number of clients each year.
footer.brandDescription: A modern, founder-led real estate advisory in South Florida. Adiel Figueroa leads every transaction.

catalog.title: The collection.
catalog.intro: Estate One Group represents a small number of residences at a time, selected for their provenance, architecture, and the discretion of their setting. The homes currently available are listed below.

noMatches.title: No residences match these criteria.
noMatches.body: Adjust your filters, or return to the full collection — quietly curated, a small list by design.

propertyDetail.locationNote: The exact address is shared with qualified buyers on request.
propertyDetail.viewingAvailable: {title} is available to view by appointment.

contact.title: A direct line to the firm.
contact.intro: Adiel Figueroa replies to every inquiry personally, within one business day. Whether you have a residence in mind or are still defining the brief — write us in English or Spanish, with equal precision.
contact.appointmentNote: Private viewings arranged for qualified buyers.

form.successTitleWithRef: Thank you for your interest in {title}.
form.successBody: Adiel will reply personally within one business day.

aboutPage.title: Founder-led. By referral.
aboutPage.intro: Estate One Group is a modern real estate firm in South Florida. We work with a small number of clients each year, with a direct, considered approach to premium homes.
aboutPage.founderAlt: Adiel Figueroa, founder of Estate One Group
aboutPage.body1: Adiel Figueroa founded Estate One Group in Miami. The firm works with a small number of clients each year — most introductions come by referral, and most representations begin with a single conversation about what kind of home is being looked for, and why.
aboutPage.body2: The orientation is architectural before it is transactional. Knowing who built a residence, in what year, with what materials, and how it has been kept matters. So does knowing what hasn't yet reached public listings — South Florida's strongest properties trade quietly, and sourcing them is its own discipline.
aboutPage.body3: Estate One Group is licensed in Florida and represents both buyers and sellers. Conversations happen in English or Spanish, with equal precision.
aboutPage.ctaTitle: Most representations begin with a single call.

principles.title: First-call brief
principles.body: A 30-minute conversation that defines what kind of residence is being sought, in what timeframe, and on what terms. No commitment, no follow-up unless requested.

principles.title: Architectural research
principles.body: For every property recommended, we provide year built, original architect when known, construction materials, structural state, and renovation history.

principles.title: Off-market sourcing
principles.body: A meaningful share of South Florida's strongest residences trade without ever appearing on a public listing platform. We make those introductions when the timing aligns.

neighborhoods.title: By neighborhood.
neighborhoods.intro: Estate One Group represents five neighborhoods deliberately — each with its own architecture, posture, and reason for being where it is. The collection follows the residences we represent, not the other way around.
neighborhoods.noListingsText: No active listings in {name} at the moment. Most homes here trade off-market — write to us if this is the area you have in mind.
neighborhoods.ctaTitle: A meaningful share of homes here trade quietly. We make those introductions.

journal.title: Notes on architecture, neighborhoods, and the market.
journal.intro: The Journal is in preparation. The first pieces will cover specific architects working in South Florida, neighborhood-level market shifts, and how to read a residence beyond its listing copy.
journal.body: Until the first piece is published, the firm shares its thinking directly — by appointment, in English or Spanish.

press.title: Press inquiries.
press.intro: Estate One Group is a founder-led modern real estate firm in South Florida, led by Adiel Figueroa. We respond to interview requests, comment requests, and editorial features within one business day.
press.brandAssets: Brand assets — logo files, founder portrait, factual boilerplate — available on request.

legal.privacyIntro: This privacy policy will be updated shortly. We collect information provided through the contact form and use it solely to respond to your inquiry.
legal.termsIntro: This terms of use document will be updated shortly. By using this website you agree to conduct yourself in accordance with applicable laws.
legal.accessibilityIntro: Estate One Group is committed to ensuring this website is accessible to everyone. If you encounter any accessibility barriers, please contact us directly.
